notes: L9 'Part 1 — open + resize + arrayify (420.4s, 3 cues)' — Code It From Scratch: PIL/NumPy preprocessing to (1,3,896,896) float32 for Gemma 4 vision. Reuses imgprep.py idiom lib. READ start/mid/end each cue; all legible, in-frame (safe-area guard passed), on-brand (dark palette, blue/orange/green, mono code + serif prose). Math verified: ImageNet mean/std exact, shape transitions (H,W,C)->(C,H,W)->(1,C,H,W) correct, float64 trap correct. 1 -ql pass, no rerender needed. ffprobe within 0.13s of storyboard span.

frames.notes: [start] Image.open('cat.jpg'): cat.jpg box, 4x4 pixel grid, .size->(4,4), .mode->'RGB', 'PIL .size is (Width,Height) not (H,W)'

[end] Image.open('cat.jpg'): cat.jpg box, 4x4 pixel grid, .size->(4,4), .mode->'RGB', 'PIL .size is (Width,Height) not (H,W)'
